title: Development and preliminary testing of the new five-level version of EQ-5D (EQ-5D-5L)
search_query: Development and preliminary testing of the new five-level version of EQ-5D (EQ-5D-5L)
notes: PURPOSE: This article introduces the new 5-level EQ-5D (EQ-5D-5L) health status measure. METHODS: EQ-5D currently measures health using three levels of severity in five dimensions. A EuroQol Group task force was established to find ways of improving the instrument's sensitivity a…
